design_philosophy: A trustworthy, calming, and highly actionable UI for pet owners during emergencies. Generous spacing, soft organic shapes (rounded-3xl), and clinical-yet-friendly typography. Emerald green acts as the primary accent, contrasting with high-alert reds for genuine emergencies.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-zinc-900
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-zinc-900

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for container inners.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Heavily rely on rounded-3xl (24px) for cards, hero images, and primary buttons.
spacing_and_layout.first_aid_kit_layout: Bento grid structure. Mix tall and wide blocks for visual interest.

surfaces_and_shadows.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-zinc-200/50 sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces_and_shadows.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-zinc-200), NO shadow by default. On hover: shadow-lg, -translate-y-1, border-emerald-200.
surfaces_and_shadows.emergency_block: Solid background (bg-zinc-950), text-white. Use subtle noise/texture overlay if possible. Use text-shadow for emphasis.
surfaces_and_shadows.buttons: Primary: bg-emerald-500 text-white hover:bg-emerald-600 rounded-full font-medium. Urgent CTA: bg-rose-500 text-white hover:bg-rose-600 rounded-full.

animations.chatbot_widget: Floating animation, bounce or gentle pulse effect to draw attention.

components.navigation: Clear logo, top links (Síntomas, Emergencias, Kit, Chat), prominent CTA. Sticky with glassmorphism.
components.hero: Two-column or asymmetrical overlay. Left: Strong H1, subtext, dual CTAs (Buscar Síntoma, Urgencia). Right: Rounded-3xl image of cute dog & cat.
components.search_filter: Large centered search bar with pill-shaped filter toggles (Todos, Perros, Gatos) below it. Use Shadcn Tabs or custom pill radio buttons.
components.symptom_card: Vertical layout. Icon top left. Title. Severity badge (URGENTE in red if applicable). Clickable area opening a Shadcn Dialog or navigating to details.
components.ai_chatbot: Floating widget bottom right or dedicated section. Uses Shadcn Card + ScrollArea for chat history. Accent color emerald.
components.lead_form: Newsletter/Download PDF kit capture in a soft emerald-50 container.
components.footer: Dark or zinc-100 background. Links to Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions.

images.alt: A Bengal cat and Yorkshire Terrier sit together
images.instructions: Place in the hero section, constrained by rounded-3xl. Make sure not to exceed 80vh on mobile.
Use for the First Aid kit section or Lead capture background.

images.alt: Brown dog running across green field
images.instructions: Use as a full-width banner image for the 'Thank You' page or conversion success page.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, search bars, filter pills, chatbot inputs, cards) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for all iconography to replace FontAwesome from the reference.
Use standard Tailwind classes. For fonts, ensure you load 'Outfit' and 'Work Sans' from Google Fonts in index.html.
Construct the site using React and React Router for the main page, /gracias, /privacidad, and /terminos.
Implement Shadcn UI for standard components like Input, Button, Dialog (for symptom details), and Tabs.
Do NOT use pure #000000 for the emergency section; use bg-zinc-950.
Ensure the hero section overlay does not blanket the whole image if you use absolute positioning—let the images breathe.
Build the floating AI chatbot using Shadcn popover or custom fixed div with state, integrated seamlessly in the bottom right.
